creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report Christian. Could you please include additional information including:

- /var/run/dmesg.boot output (as an attachment)
- pciconf -lv output (as an attachment)
- /etc/rc.conf network configuration (sanitized if necessary)

Additionally, are you able to test a 13.0-RELEASE or 14.0-CURRENT snapshot or live image?
